summary: Iteration 12 — Frontend-only verification of the CRITICAL post-elimination spectator-viewing fix. Injected a complete eliminated_done savedState (formationId=4-3-3 + 11×88-ovr xi + tactic=TIKI_TAKA + tournament.stage='eliminated_done' with fully populated r16/qf/sf/final ties, eliminatedAt='Son 16', champion=Op2) into localStorage and reloaded the React app. TASK A FULLY VERIFIED — All 3 spectator buttons render in the eliminated_done block: watch-final-button (count=1), watch-sf-button (count=1), watch-qf-button (count=1). Clicking each opens MatchScreen modal correctly. All three matches play through both legs at ULTRA speed and reach the close-match-button (phase='done' on isLastLeg). The data-testid='user-result' element correctly shows 'KAZANAN: Op2' (the spectator label) for ALL three — NOT 'TUR ATLADIN' nor 'ELENDİN'. Crucially, after the Final match completes and is closed, the TrophyScreen does NOT trigger (verified text 'KUPA SAHİBİ' count=0 after close), confirming spectator=true correctly bypasses the trophy flow even though stage='Final'. TournamentScreen remains intact after each modal close (watch-final-button still present, count=1). TASK C VISUAL REGRESSION VERIFIED — data-testid='user-knockout-card' count=1 on the Son 16 user row, class contains 'ring-amber-300/70' (amber ring intact), 'SENİN TAKIMIN' label rendered. UZATMA + PENALTI badge logic from iter-11 unchanged. Modal title shows 'Final · LEG 1/2 · İLK MAÇ' confirming the 2-leg tie shape is honored. PageError count: 0.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED — /app/frontend/src/screens/TournamentScreen.jsx:327-347 — Three spectator buttons render correctly in the eliminated_done block. Gating logic is correct: watch-qf only on Son 16; watch-sf on Son 16 or Çeyrek Final; watch-final always when state.final[0].tie exists. All three onClick handlers correctly pass spectator:true to onMatch.

VERIFIED — /app/frontend/src/screens/MatchScreen.jsx:357-361 — user-result block correctly branches on match.spectator: shows 'KAZANAN: <winner-label>' for spectator matches, falls back to 'TUR ATLADIN' / 'ELENDİN' for normal play. Live test confirmed 'KAZANAN: Op2' rendering for Final, SF, and QF spectator matches.

VERIFIED — /app/frontend/src/App.js:186-193 — Trophy guard `m.stage === 'Final' && m.userWon && m.championRef` correctly skips trophy when userWon=false (spectator case sets userWon:false), so the TrophyScreen does NOT trigger when watching the final as a spectator. Confirmed by checking 'KUPA SAHİBİ' text count=0 after closing the Final spectator modal.

POSITIVE — Conditional rendering aligns with the user complaint ('YARI FİNALE ELENDİM VE FİNAL MAÇINI İZLEYEMEDİM'): when eliminatedAt='Yarı Final', only watch-final-button shows (sf/qf hidden via the eliminatedAt guard) which is the correct, minimal UI for that scenario.

NIT — autoCompleteBracket (TournamentScreen.jsx:121-174) calls playKnockout with stageBonus increasing through rounds (1/2/3/4) which aligns with the difficulty tuning the request describes. The legacy +3 in overallEngine.js and form -3..+1 / injury 15% in tournamentEngine.js were not deeply validated (TASK D is subjective) but no crash observed in any simulated match.

NIT — Consider extracting the eliminated_done watch-buttons block into a small component (e.g., <SpectatorActions />) to keep TournamentScreen.jsx readable; the file is at 474 lines now, still under the 700-line guideline but trending up.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on CRITICAL TASK A — All 3 watch-* buttons render in eliminated_done block, all 3 open MatchScreen, all 3 play to completion, all 3 show 'KAZANAN: <label>' instead of TUR ATLADIN/ELENDİN, trophy does NOT trigger for spectator Final, TournamentScreen intact after close. TASK C bracket amber ring verified. TASK B (happy-path TUR ATLADIN/ELENDİN) covered by code-review of MatchScreen.jsx:357-361 ternary — no regression possible since match.spectator falsey falls through to original logic. TASK D not deeply tested (subjective).

seed_data_creation: localStorage 'ucl_draft_save_v1' with screen='tournament', formationId='4-3-3', xi=11× 88-overall dummy players matching 4-3-3 slot positions, tactic='TIKI_TAKA', tournament={stage:'eliminated_done', r16/qf/sf/final fully populated with played:true and tie objects {legs:[leg1,leg2], aggregate, winner, decidedBy:'aggregate'}, champion=Op2, eliminatedAt='Son 16'}. 'ucl_match_speed_v1'='ultra'. Each leg has events[] with minute/side/type/text. User team beaten 1-3 in R16 leg-1+leg-2 by Op1.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The post-elimination spectator-viewing fix is live and working end-to-end. Watch-* buttons appear conditionally based on eliminatedAt, each opens MatchScreen with match.spectator=true, MatchScreen renders 'KAZANAN: <label>' user-result, and Trophy screen is correctly skipped because spectator matches have userWon:false. If future iterations modify either TournamentScreen.jsx (eliminated_done block) or MatchScreen.jsx (user-result ternary) or App.js trophy guard, re-run with the seed in this report to confirm the spectator flow. The conditional rendering for Çeyrek Final / Yarı Final could not be live-tested in a single browser session due to add_init_script persisting across reloads (test infra limitation, not a product bug); the logic was instead verified by code-review at TournamentScreen.jsx:329-346.
rca of the issue: RESOLVED. User complaint 'YARI FİNALE ELENDİM VE FİNAL MAÇINI İZLEYEMEDİM' addressed by (A) adding 3 spectator buttons to the eliminated_done block which call onMatch with spectator:true, (B) updating MatchScreen.user-result to display 'KAZANAN: <winner>' for spectator matches, (C) App.js trophy trigger already correctly guarded by m.userWon so spectator matches (userWon:false) skip trophy. Live test confirmed all 3 buttons render, all 3 modals open and complete, all 3 show KAZANAN label, no trophy fires on Final spectator close, TournamentScreen remains intact.
